---
id: query-automation-manual-trigger-list
title: "Get Manual Trigger List"
description: "You can query the list of manual triggers within specific automations by IDs."
sidebar_label: "Get Manual Trigger List"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Manual Trigger List"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations/manual-triggers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



You can query the list of manual triggers within specific automations by IDs.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"automationIds","required":false,"description":"Automation ID list.\nExample: automationIds=xx1,xx2 or automationIds=xx1&automationIds=xx2.\nIf empty, the response will return all manual triggers within the accessible automations.\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"in":"query","name":"enabledOnly","required":false,"description":"Whether to return only manual triggers under enabled automations.<br />true: Only return manual triggers of enabled automations.<br />false: Return manual triggers of all automations.","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}},{"in":"query","name":"includeSpace","required":false,"description":"Whether to return the current associated space of the automation to which the manual trigger belongs.<br />true: Return the current associated space of the automation.<br />false: Do not return space information.","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","description":"List of manual triggers","items":{"type":"object","required":["automationId","automationName","triggerNodeId","triggerName","enabled","definitionType","createTime"],"properties":{"automationId":{"type":"string","description":"Automation ID."},"automationName":{"type":"string","description":"Automation name."},"triggerNodeId":{"type":"string","description":"Manual trigger node ID."},"triggerName":{"type":"string","description":"Manual trigger name."},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether the automation is enabled."},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"],"description":"Automation type."},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Creation time (UTC timestamp in milliseconds)"},"space":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["spaceId","name"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"Space ID"},"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"Parent space ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Space name"},"spatialMarking":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"Space tag"},"children":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"items":"circular(SpaceNode)","description":"Child space list (recursive structure)"}},"title":"SpaceNode"}],"nullable":true,"description":"The current associated space of the automation; only returned when `includeSpace` is true, and null if not associated with any space."}},"title":"AutomationManualTriggerInfo"}}}}],"title":"QueryAutomationManualTriggerListResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request parameter error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx is required"},"description":"Error response.
